texto: Flowing egoism is not objectionable but if it is caught-up even a little-bit
autor: it is known as obstinacy. Flowing egoism is dramatic egoism. It is not problematic.
explicacao: Citação de it is known as obstinacy. Flowing egoism is dramatic egoism. It is not problematic. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Flowing egoism is not objectionable but if it is caught-up even a little-bit” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, flowing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
